gappa
=====

# Available modules


The overview below shows which gappa installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using gappa, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load gappa/0.9.0-GCC-12.3.0
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
